command: qwayk-hubspot-safe-agent-cli hubspot objects create --object-type contacts --body-file body.json

before_state.statement: No saved before-state is available for this HubSpot write family/action. Apply may proceed only after explicit no-snapshot approval, and the receipt must record the recovery limit.

rollback_plan.statement: No automatic rollback is available because this CLI does not yet create safe before-state snapshots or provider backups for HubSpot writes.
